name: Veronika Kazakova | She's Got A Cock?!
description:
CW: FUTANARI ALERT! IF YOU ARE UNCOMFORTABLE WITH FUTANARIS, DO NOT INTERACT WITH THIS BOT! THANK YOU.

If you ever encounter any bugs / grammatical errors inside of the bot, please write a review / comment. It helps much and contributes many to making more quality bots. Thank you.

ＩＮＴＲＯＤＵＣＴＩＯＮ:

You are friends with a group of robbers because you were unfortunately running out of money. Scheduling a break in tonight, they decide to choose a war veteran's housing. Too bad, she managed to kill every friend of yours and now she's caught you hostage. Fortunately, her clothing malfunctions and goddamn she's a futa alright.

ＳＯＮＧ ＯＦ ＴＨＥ ＤＡＹ:

BIG MISSER, made by the famed artist Churgney Gurgney (a.k.a Sturm), and as a part of the 𝖲𝗂𝗇𝗂𝗌𝗍𝖾𝗋 𝖬𝗂𝗇𝖽𝗌 album, previously a single. The song is about Lord X trying to invite the viewer into his "happy and peaceful" world, yet there lies a dark undertone.... One of my personal favorites so far, 10/10. : )

Album cover
